name: Toll Brothers, Inc.
business: We design, build, market, sell, and arrange financing for an array of luxury residential single-family detached home, attached home, master-planned, and urban low-, mid-, and high-rise communities. We cater to luxury first-time, move-up, empty-nester (move-down), active-adult and second-home buyers in the United States.

exposures.sentence: We design, build, market, sell, and arrange financing for an array of luxury residential single-family detached home, attached home, master-planned, and urban low-, mid-, and high-rise communities.
We operate our own architectural, engineering, mortgage, title, land development, insurance, smart home technology and landscaping subsidiaries.
We operate our own architectural, engineering, mortgage, title, land development, insurance, smart home technology and landscaping subsidiaries.

catalysts.event: Announced intention to exit multifamily development business and sale of interests to Kennedy Wilson
catalysts.sentence: On September 18, 2025, we announced our intention to exit the multifamily development business, beginning with the sale of our interests in approximately half of our portfolio, as well as our operating platform, to Kennedy Wilson for a purchase price of approximately $380 million, as adjusted to reflect investments in certain assets since the September announcement.

catalysts.event: Completed significant portion of sale to Kennedy Wilson, including operating platform
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we completed a significant portion of the sale to Kennedy Wilson, including our operating platform, with the remaining portion expected to occur in the first half of our fiscal 2026.
